questionHtml: Many animals, including humans, maintain strongly acidic conditions in part of their digestive systems. Explain two benefits of this to the animal.
markschemeHtml:
a. provides ideal pH for stomach enzyme activity 

b. (acidic conditions) denature proteins /start breakdown of other organic substances 

c. (acidic conditions) convert pepsinogen (inactive) into pepsin 

d. (acidic conditions) destroy pathogens in ingested food

meta.title: Many animals, including humans, maintain strongly acidic conditions in part of their digestive systems. Explain two benefits of this to the animal.
